name: Wonder High Dress-Up
author: Poki
description: Wonder High Dress-Up is a monstrously fashionable dress-up game where you can create your own creepy class of stylish creatures. Dress up your character, as well as your scary classmates, in the latest frightening fashion! Customize your face, outfits, shoes, tails, and wings! Do you have what it takes to become the most ominous icon of Wonder High? How to play Wonder High Dress-Up? Moving around: Drag with your mouse or finger, use WASD, or the arrow keys. Changing clothes: Walk up to one of the lockers and select whatever item strikes your fancy! Swapping dolls: C to go to the next doll, Z to go back to the previous one Posing and expressions: P to open the menu, then click or tap on the option you want Freeze a doll: Press V to freeze the doll in place, keeping it standing perfectly still for group photos! Take a picture: Press O to capture the perfect image of your freaky fashionistas Who created Wonder High Dress-Up? Wonder High Dress-Up is created by Entrevero Games. They have other amazing games on Poki: Merge Monster Battles , Vero Life - Dress Up & Decor , Kawaii Dress-Up , Fairy Dress-Up , Dungeons & Dress-Ups , Bearsus , Cozy Room Design , Full Metal Football , Blobby Slime Quest , Cozy Garden Design , CombiMon , and Stick Fighter ! How can I play Wonder High Dress-Up for free? You can play Wonder High Dress-Up for free on Poki. Can I play Wonder High Dress-Up on mobile devices and desktop? Wonder High Dress-Up can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
